message:
test(golden,bd-zefv4): pin cass stats --json happy-path envelope against fixture DB

Pre-fix: only the error-envelope variant of stats --json was pinned
(stats_missing_db{,_shape}.json.golden). The success-path envelope
every operator sees every day — total counts, by_source breakdowns,
token rollups when enabled — had no freeze. A regression to a field
name, a new mandatory key, or a key-order rewrite on the happy path
would pass CI silently.

Adds two goldens, both driven by the existing search_demo_data
fixture (324 KB canonical DB with a known conversation/message
count, already used by search_robot_json_matches_golden):

- robot/stats_full_payload.json.golden — scrubbed concrete instance
  pinning the base stats envelope (24 lines).
- robot/stats_full_payload_shape.json.golden — json_value_schema
  shape pin (52 lines) so key + type regressions trip even when the
  scrubber tolerates value drift.

Two new tests in tests/golden_robot_json.rs:
- stats_json_happy_path_matches_golden
- stats_json_happy_path_shape_matches_golden

Both pass under UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 (generate) and under normal run
(verify). Pattern mirrors the existing search_robot golden pair.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-zefv4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+{
+  "conversations": 2,
+  "messages": 6,
+  "by_agent": [
+    {
+      "agent": "aider",
+      "count": 2
+    }
+  ],
+  "top_workspaces": [
+    {
+      "workspace": "/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search",
+      "count": 1
+    },
+    {
+      "workspace": "/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/fixtures/aider",
+      "count": 1
+    }
+  ],
+  "date_range": {
+    "oldest": "[TIMESTAMP]",
+    "newest": "[TIMESTAMP]"
+  },
+  "db_path": "[TEST_HOME]/search_demo_data/agent_search.db"
+}
\ No newline at end of file
